introSection: Montanha Russa was a steel roller coaster that operated at American Park in Belo Horizonte, Minas Gerais, Brazil from September 1997 to 1999. It isn't known what happened to it after it left American Park. It had yellow track and purple supports and the trains were white.
fullText: Montanha Russa was a steel roller coaster that operated at American Park in Belo Horizonte, Minas Gerais, Brazil from September 1997 to 1999. It isn't known what happened to it after it left American Park. It had yellow track and purple supports and the trains were white.
